oh
fortress is a damage reduction mechanic that some enemies have

when u play sayaurita and 70% of your deck is gland divisions you don't need to know what the aurita card it is, it's probably a gland division 
and then u spam aurita exalt
also you can use like 8 per turn easily

sjmilar w saya saga comp
u basically just take saya Sanga and 2 more wardens
u don't care what the card is as long as it probably gives shield, its just a crapload of free aliemus

and it lowers the arithmetica cost on average so even if u use the wrong card it matters less, usually

just in general it works best in teams that just don't really have cards you wouldnt want to use (you can also usually guess the card based on the cost and awakener)
I found it!.... in the trapese tutorial....
not sure fortress works exactly the same in traphase, that's a different game mode with a separate set of rules for most mechanics.
but it's close enough I guess.

In any case, regular boss Fortress of X value provides X% damage reduction, and can only be removed by a single ability in the game (Vortice's Exalt). 
So if bosses get 100% temporary Fortress through some ability (often phase transition or taking Y damage) you're stuck waiting around for it to drop off.
